response.justification: Bogdan has deep full-stack engineering experience and notable open-source contributions, including AI-agent infrastructure work, but lacks clear evidence of AI product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or the 15-year trajectory expected for a director-level IC role; his startup-like initiatives are impressive but not at scale or within AI-focused enterprises.
strengths: Strong full-stack and systems engineering background across diverse domains
Active open-source contributions with AI-agent and infrastructure tooling experience
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives and share knowledge through workshops
concerns: No demonstrable AI product or platform built from concept to production
Limited evidence of cloud architecture strategy or enterprise AI adoption leadership
Experience spans many domains but lacks focused depth in AI/ML at scale
